So I stopped using it.
i mean naut's whole purpose is making counter into aoe

Thank you

if you invest in kath you need e3

What blasphemy is this!😭 <:angry1:1356053023272599668>
4 copies of a limited unit
This seems like a good second team for D-tide
Thank you so much
np
i would reccomend swapping to the full blue vort team tho
she benefits a lot from a stall setup which sanga celeste provide in spades

Got it.
So, salvador ain't enough for stalling? In comparison to those?
Also, I would like to ask if this wheel is only good for poison comps?
Salvador is way better for stalling but you lose half of your RM scaling if you mix realms
Might still be a worthwhile trade though to not run Sanga

Ahh got it.
So, the game wants us to play units of same realm 
But if some units are stronk then we can mix them in the team.
More or less
Some teams also lose less from mixing than others
works on any unit where playing a strike for free is valuable
Guys ,This is my current kath team and i just got ryker ,it says in guide he's good for kath.who do i replace for him ?or is it not required ?

What’s the current bis Vortice team if there is one ?
you can replace ramona

u can ignore his cards most of the time
in a kath team
theres no "bis" vortice team, she has a lot of teams that are all capable of clearing alert 5
as long as you give her a keyflare bot and defensive supports shes very flexible
I see,
theres an easiest vort team
and a invested vort team lol
Wait a few months until we get some more powercreep so we see which comps stand long term and which fall off <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>

Hope you pump out vids for this anni ,desreve more views
thats sweet thank you, its only my first video but ill be looking to make more :)

I'd like to share a bit of theorcrafting here... just for the mental exercice.

Let say a player only pull on the Ultra standard banner. What is the teams we could expect it to produce?
First, I looked again at the characters:

Those are 4 DPS and 4 supports.
A team is usualy 3 support, so only one on the 4 support will not be used (maybe 2, if the player feels that Doll is better than the 3rd)

Horla might be rarer, she would appear and work at E0, I expect her to be in every team starting with it's predicate.
Winkle is also pretty good and versatile, so it would be either Tinct or Casiah or both that would go, most probably
assuming you dont get any of the limited
the strongest team is probably like jenkin ogier casiah winkle
which should be able to do all of arc 1
maybe liz jenkin ogier winkle
Well, if you keep pulling on that banner, you will get the limited as well, pure cores aren't that rare
if you get daff or horla then they become strongest option
Winkle is the strongest of the 3 non-limited support, I agree, probably everyone playing like that will use her
i wouldnt say strongest, but she is good in this situation, not easily replaceable
yes, it's more accurate
In my case, pulling on this banner since the beginning, I have all them except Wanda
There is 4 DPS, and she might be the weakest (in the current state of the game) ?
wanda is not really a dps
Do you count her as a support too?
if u look at her best team shes more of an enabler
spine needle has damage but its not really wanda doing the damage
behind every 100k dmg spine needle is a lv90 oe daffodil
so yes wanda is definitely a support
if u try to run her as dps then shes the worst dps lol

That theorycrafting is due to my current situation... I'm a beginner that started with the Ultra, don't want to spread their core around, and landed in a time where the limited banner don't motivate him
So my wondering is "Could I have gone another way than the teams I made? Or is it more a consequence of the content of this banner?"
i strongly suggest pulling other realms too
mixed ultra is better for beginners than pure ultra
pure ultra only works if u have kath or lily or clem doing heavy lifting
yeah, but the odds to pull the unit I need for the ultra start from another realms are just too low
what do you mean by the ultra start
strat
Like if I just want to stay in that realm mechanics, and not do something else entierly
its more effective if you do other stuff in addition to ultra mechanics <:idk:1356084138280489080>
if u want to intentionally handicap yourself then i guess sure
Well, I figured I can add some chaos, and still retain the full ultraspace bonus
But it's just, the chaos banner is too low on odds to draw a compatible character with an ultra team
nymphaea is good with liz
alva is good everywhere
karen is good
pandia ONLY works in ultra with daff
Not sure Karen is always fitting... like... Liz and Karen sounds counter-intuitive
and nautila is the best defensive character
in pure ultra standards
karen is an arithmetica support
who also provides weakness
Yes, but she has retain, which is annoying with deadly flames
u dont have to run her with liz
u can run karen jenkin for example, to do X cost then get arith back and immediately play other cards
also i forgot but erica is also a standard character and shes quite good
I understand, naturally, I just say that if the goal is to IMPROVE a ultra team you have, and you run actually Liz, you don't want to pull Karen
if the goal is to improve your liz team u should be pulling limited characters and wheels
not pouring pure cores into ultra banner regardless
or pulling caro banner so u can make caro liz
or even pulling aequor and doing some cursed liz faros caecus comp
will be stronger

That's a bit aside the theorycrafting I was speaking at first... but ok, just switching to my current situation right now

I pulled a lot on Ultra, and I have fun that way.
The actually Limited banner do not interest me much. I know they are strong, they aren't just the think I want to play.
I have two teams that have both Horla & Winkle... first if Daff & Casiah, the other is Liz & Doll

So, yes, I'd like to improve those teams more, but if I'm not mistaken, I have more odds to improve one of the two teams by keep pulling on the Ultra for dupes, than pulling on the other where 80% of the characters won't fit in one of those two strats
We love liz
if you already have e3 liz then pulling ultra has minimal impact

On 8 character of Ultra, I'm happy to recieve a copy of 5 of them.
On 11 characters of Chaos, I'm not sure if there is 4 I want
pulling other banners has much more value for you
as you own zero of those characters
and u have more team options
by not pulling those banners u also have fewer teams for dtide
My goal for the moment is not to create "more strats", but yes, I'll need to do some someday ... (soon? not sure)
which means u are missing silver rewards every reset
you can do dtide right now
Currently my biggest issue is that I'm lagging a lot behind in keeper level
To be fair pulls are nice enough that missing dtide silver isn't the end of the world. If anything the loss of level up materials hurts the most
recommended level means nothing fyi
But if youre playing casual really no rush either way
ur keeper level will permanently be underleveled
It means my skills are locked down "you don't have enough keeper level to upgrade the skill"
i beat all story stages with keeper level 51 on my speedrun account
and I'm keeper level 32
the fastest way to raise keeper level is just do story
and do hard modes
done
what, you beat the whole game already?
No, until I reach bosses that one-shot me
this is normal
yes, I heard
But I have no story content I can progress rn
thats where u run into the problems with pure ultra
u lack a good tank
and u arent in aequor or caro so u dont have those realm mechanics to back u up
u are self handicapping by not pulling limited characters and not pulling any other realm
doing an even more difficult challenge run than i did on my speedrun account lol
Honeslty, when I look at all people offering level 50 supports, they have 10 more keeper levels than me
Yes, when you know the game by heart, you probably aim for a team you know be suited to the base content right from the beginning
But I feel if I could upgrade the skills of my characters it will be enough to pass the current bosses
what stage are you stuck on
Chap 7 boss
yea you need sustain
winkle is not soloing it
I noticed
its very easy if u do mixed caro
Planning for speedrun is different than planning to play what you like
What's the qn here
I picked Ultra because I love the mechanics of that realms much more
i also love ultra, a caro ultra team is still ultra
i cant stop you from playing something you want to play
At the start it was a little theorycrafting about the best team you could do ONLY pulling the Ultra banner... but it has a bit deviated and I'm speaking a bit of my personal experience on the side
but i feel obligated to point out that its a lot easier if u relax your restrictions
and then u wont be hard stuck on story anymore
Oh
I don't feel I'm really stuck, it's just I need time to replenish meno and reach keeper 35 to unlock the skill upgrades
I assume original qn answered then
All good play at your own pace. Just know that it'll probably be slower and less efficient
frankly i dont think skill upgrades will help, u will still gnosis
Honestly those boss are doable, I just get tired of harcoring them when I know I'll just pass them easily with a bit of skill 3, better covenant and wheels upgrades
its a team comp issue
Gnosis is fine, I'm just like always "damn, I was close" and then shrugged off "I'll do them later"
I agree with Cheri. But honestly you can play the game how you like
unless u are oneshotting every boss stage with lv70 daffodil
u will still have no sustain for the 20 turn boss fight
If you really want a pure ultra team. You'll minimally need castor
Limited unit
yes, castor or lily or clem
The issue is that the limited ultra pulls currently are.... limited?
Yes
Hence you won't progress fast
As long as you understand that, it's ok

That's why I've slown down, and wait to see Arachne to do more plans. Honestly, I don't dislike challenging myself with stupid ideas like "I'll play only Ultra".... that's a kind of fun not everyone enjoy, I know, but sometimes... I do.
If you really want an alternative
Ogier is a decent sustain
I don't feel yet at a stage where I need to break my playstyle, it's just a bit of patience, and Arachne might change everything (or not at all)
The true decision of if I stay on that "challenge" is postponed until her release
shes not coming out for another 2 weeks at least <:cry3:1356082134447558748>
Yes, that's why I'm trying to see what I can grind during that time
Lightless realm
Tbf he understands the difficulty and hes got a goal. So long as hes happy with where everything stands thats all there is to it not really a need to reevaluate unless the game stops being fun
wait... can I start that without completing the first story???
damn, now that's something
u can finish the whole thing and get lv60 characters early
its what i did when i started
You don't need other realms as a requirement tho
Where I can enter it?
Interlude then the eye icon on the left
ah yes, I started that on ultra
You can do ultra realm in entirety and the other 3 will need up to 2 people from that realm added into your team to do
forgot it was herre
asian-style game are always a navigation hell
<@693905974750216212> is a f2p jenkins lover who mains her.
I currently love Liz the most, but play Daffodil more often, because the Daffodil & Casiah combo is fun for me at the moment
Liz will be game changing when lily comes back around
Lily and her wheel making tanking so nice and the force poison proc is bae
lily and liz would be nice
sadly liz is kind of married to xu
I'm not totally against mixing some chaos later, the theme is more "pushing the ultra mechanics as far as possible"... and if I get it right, chaos do not weaken it
yes, gdoll is a big upgrade for daffodil
Yep chaos keeps a path pure and adds its own buff to it. For ultra it drains enemy str and give you str based on your max hp when the battle starts
Is Ryker Kath good?
yes
guys i just got Kath cuz I liked the gameplay but idk how to build a team with her
i just started like hours ago
Same. Just got Kath.
you guys can check pin msg of frost and cheris guide
